overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character navigating through a dystopian urban environment. The sequence begins in a dark interior room with hacking interface elements, transitions through a security door into an alleyway, moves through a covered walkway with graffiti and monitors, passes through a holographic 'NO ENTRY' barrier, and ends in a narrow alley with overhead cables and a burning vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure interior room with hacking interface

events.description: hacking interface activates with red warning symbols and progress bar

agents.ego_description: standing in dark room facing a security door, engaging with hacking interface

entered.detail: metal security door with red laser line lock mechanism
overhead blue spotlight illuminating the door
wall-mounted monitor screen on left wall

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a dimly lit concrete room facing a security door. A blue spotlight illuminates the door while a hacking interface with red warning symbols appears on screen, indicating an interaction with the door's locking mechanism.

events.description: security door opens with red scanning overlay revealing bright exterior alley

agents.ego_description: walking through the opening security door into the exterior alleyway

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near yellow barrier, watching the player

entered.detail: concrete barriers with yellow tops lining both sides of the alley
yellow graffiti-style sign reading AUTOFIX above distant doorway

segments.scene_description: The security door opens with a red scanning effect, revealing a bright exterior alley lined with yellow concrete barriers. A guard in red armor stands to the left near the barrier as the player exits the building into the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor between exterior and covered walkway

events.description: enters covered walkway from exterior alley, lighting shifts to artificial

agents.ego_description: walking past the guard and entering the covered walkway entrance

entered.detail: doorway leading into covered corridor with metal framing
stack of metal folding chairs against right wall
black garbage bags piled near the chairs

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the guard and transitions from the exterior alley into a covered walkway. The environment shifts from natural to artificial lighting as the player passes stacks of folding chairs and trash bags against the graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: fluorescent lights flicker as player approaches the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor passing wall monitors and graffiti

entered.detail: metal ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
multiple screens mounted on left wall displaying data
red glowing holographic sign reading NO ENTRY blocking the exit

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds through the covered walkway with graffiti-covered concrete walls and flickering fluorescent lights. Wall monitors display data on the left while a red holographic NO ENTRY sign glows at the far end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with holographic security barrier

events.description: player passes through the NO ENTRY holographic barrier which flickers and deactivates
exits covered walkway into narrow outdoor alley with overhead cables

agents.ego_description: walking through the holographic barrier and emerging into the narrow alley

entered.detail: dense network of black cables and wires spanning between buildings overhead
vehicle on fire with orange flames and black smoke

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the red NO ENTRY hologram which flickers upon contact, transitioning from the covered corridor into a narrow outdoor alley. Overhead cables crisscross between tall industrial buildings while a burning vehicle becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with burning debris

events.description: smoke density increases as player approaches the burning vehicle

agents.ego_description: advancing cautiously through the narrow alley toward the smoke and fire

entered.detail: abandoned vehicles parked along the left side of the alley
tall concrete industrial structures with metal fire escapes

segments.scene_description: The player continues down the narrow industrial alley, passing under dense overhead cable networks. A burning vehicle on the right emits thick smoke that reduces visibility, while abandoned cars line the left side of the asphalt path between tall concrete buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile, dimly lit interior into a chaotic and decaying industrial alleyway. It begins in a concrete room where a blue spotlight hits a security door, with a red hacking interface flickering on screen before the door slides open to reveal a bright exterior alley lined with yellow barriers and a guarded checkpoint. As the camera moves past the guard, the scene shifts from natural light into a covered walkway characterized by graffiti-covered walls, stacks of trash, and flickering fluorescent monitors. The path then leads through a glowing red holographic NO ENTRY sign that flickers upon contact, transitioning the environment from the enclosed corridor into a narrow outdoor passage. Finally, the camera advances under a dense network of overhead cables and past abandoned cars, ending as thick smoke from a burning vehicle obscures the view between towering concrete buildings.
